docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $112.62 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT TON-UP CYCLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
